basic_details.job_title: PJTAU Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Teaching Associates, Part Time Teachers Posts
basic_details.short_information: Professor Jayashankar Telangana Agricultural University (PJTAU) Teaching Associates / Part Time Teachers Notification 2026 has been released on 02 May 2026 on the official website of PJTAU. A total of 8 vacancies have been announced through the PJTAU Teaching Associates / Part Time Teachers Recruitment 2026. Candidates who have M.Sc. (Ag) in relevant subject, M.V.Sc. in Veterinary and Animal Science, and Ph.D. / NET preferable qualification are eligible to apply for these Teaching Associates / Part Time Teachers vacancies. The walk-in interview process for PJTAU Teaching Associates / Part Time

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. (Ag) in relevant subject, Ph.D. / NET preferable, Two years of teaching experience at UG level preferable
qualification.details: Teaching Associate (Agronomy): M.Sc. (Ag) in Agronomy. Ph.D. / NET preferable. Two years of teaching experience at UG level preferable. Teaching Associate (Genetics and Plant Breeding): M.Sc. (Ag) in Genetics and Plant Breeding. Ph.D. / NET preferable. Two years of teaching experience at UG level preferable. Teaching Associate (Agricultural Economics): M.Sc. (Ag) in Agricultural Economics. Ph.D. / NET preferable. Two years of teaching experience at UG level preferable. Teaching Associate (Soil Science and Agricultural Chemistry): M.Sc. (Ag) in Soil Science and Agricultural Chemistry. Ph.D. / NET preferable. Two years of teaching experience at UG level preferable. Teaching Associate (Agricultural Extension): M.Sc. (Ag) in Agricultural Extension. Ph.D. / NET preferable. Two years of teaching experience at UG level preferable. Teaching Associate (Horticulture): M.Sc. in Horticulture. Ph.D. / NET preferable. Two years of teaching experience at UG level preferable. Part Time Teacher (Animal production): M.V.Sc. in Veterinary and Animal Science (Preferable LPM). Ph.D. / NET preferable. Two years of teaching experience at UG level preferable.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Teaching Associate (Soil Science and Agricultural Chemistry)

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 54,000/- per month (Teaching Associates with Ph.D), Rs. 49,000/- per month (Teaching Associates with M.Sc.), Rs.1,000/- per hour (Part time Teacher)
salary_details.details: Teaching Associates with Ph.D: Rs. 54,000/- per month Teaching Associates with M.Sc.: Rs. 49,000/- per month Part time Teacher: Rs.1,000/- per hour

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for PJTAU recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews are scheduled for 11 May 2026 and 12 May 2026, depending on the specific post. Candidates should ensure they attend on the correct date for their desired position.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Teaching Associate posts?
faq.answer: For Teaching Associate positions, candidates need an M.Sc. (Ag) in the relevant subject. A Ph.D. or NET qualification is preferable, along with two years of teaching experience at the undergraduate level.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for Teaching Associates?
faq.answer: Teaching Associates with a Ph.D. will receive Rs. 54,000/- per month, while those with an M.Sc. will receive Rs. 49,000/- per month. Part-time teachers will be paid Rs. 1,000/- per hour.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 8 vacancies for the posts of Teaching Associates and Part Time Teachers.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for these positions will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews will be held at the PJTAU office in Sircilla, Telangana, with the pincode 505405.

faq.question: Q9. Is there an age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any minimum or maximum age limit for any of the posts. Age relaxation details are also not provided.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are contractual in nature.
